notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias

coachLine: Sim-optimal for 10s rotation vs squishies: first spike lands around minute 12 (Spectral Schematics), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +19.5% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

all.name: Marrow
all.note: Marrow (Major): missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

all.name: Nihil
all.note: Nihil (Major): accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

all.name: Aion
all.note: Aion (Major): economy effect; valuable but outside combat objectives (revisit with gold curves)

all.name: Exarch
all.note: Exarch (Major): buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

augments.name: Communion
augments.note: converts Mortal Coil execute into an ally self-heal zone; team-side rework

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 25 — about 892 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +23% more one-combo burst: try Spectral Schematics over Entropy (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for 10s rotation damage, online around minute 25 — about 947 damage over a 10s rotation in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +74% more 10s rotation damage: try Spectral Schematics over Tainted Scepter (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for physical survivability, online around minute 24 — about 5,527 effective HP vs physical in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer agrees: within 6% of our best core on physical survivability. The winrate is earned, not luck.

matchups.gameplan: Your window is early: force trades before their core completes, and do not coin-flip fights past the crossover.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Wraith Leggings: their 3s all-in loses 33% of its bite; you give up 25% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Wraith Leggings: their 3s all-in loses 33% of its bite; you give up 25% of your damage.

name: Renna

laneFlex.headline: drain sustain
laneFlex.provenance: “Netherward” ⇒ sustain; the sim models this augment — field midlane 52.4% over 589,482 games.

laneFlex.headline: physical survival
laneFlex.provenance: “Communion” ⇒ sustain; the sim can’t model this augment — steered by the declared playstyle + field evidence — field support 47.1% over 39,838 games, magnitude not simulated.
